---
title: "Acerca de mí"
page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
![Ángel Gabriel Munguía Velázquez](assets/yo.jpg){width=280px style="border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

## Gabriel Velázquez

I am currently pursuing a bachelor's degree in physics. I have a strong interest in and focus on quantum computing, artificial intelligence, and computational physics.

### Contacto

- angelxdmv123@gmail.com (personal)
- angel.munguiavz@udlap.mx (institutional)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AngelGab3)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/%C3%A1ngel-gabriel-mungu%C3%ADa-vel%C3%A1zquez-53806930a/)

:::

::::

---

## Experiencia

| Empresa | Rol | Período |
|---|---|---|
| Empresa A | Nada | fechas |
| Empresa B | Nada | fecha |

---

## Educación

**Licenciatura en Física**
Bachillerato 5 de mayo | 2021 - 2024
Programa del Diploma (DP) del Bachillerato Internacional (IB) | 2022 - 2024
Universidad de las Américas Puebla | 2024

---

## Herramientas que uso

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3}
**Lenguajes**
- Python
- Swift
- Matlab
- C
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
**Librerías**
- Pandas
- Plotly
- Scikit-learn
- Tensor Flow
- Numpy
- Quskit
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
**Herramientas**
- Quarto
- Git
- Jupyter Notebooks
- Symulink
- Pycharm
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
**Otros**
- XD
- Xd
:::

:::
